# SolutionRun

> Single execution of a solution with cost and performance tracking

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| solutionId | string | yes | - | Solution that was executed |
| organizationId | string | yes | - | Organization that owns this run |
| input | json | yes | - | Input data for the run |
| output | json | yes | - | Output data from the run |
| status | running \| completed \| failed \| timeout | yes | running | Execution status |
| cost | float | yes | - | Total cost in USD |
| durationMs | integer | yes | - | Execution duration in milliseconds |
| modelUsed | string | yes | - | Model used for this run |
| tokensIn | integer | yes | - | Input tokens consumed |
| tokensOut | integer | yes | - | Output tokens generated |
| error | string | yes | - | Error message if failed |
| traceId | string | yes | - | Links to distributed trace |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- belongsTo **Solution** (via `solutionId`)

## Queries

- `runsBySolution`: `SELECT solutionId, COUNT(*) as run_count,
       SUM(cost) as total_cost, AVG(durationMs) as avg_duration
FROM solution_run
WHERE createdAt >= $start AND createdAt <= $end
GROUP BY solutionId
ORDER BY total_cost DESC`

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/solution-run` — List all
- `POST /api/solution-run` — Create
- `GET /api/solution-run/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/solution-run/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/solution-run/:id` — Delete
